languages.text: "Но предупреждаю сразу — они осторожны, и выманить их на сделку сможет лишь слух о поистине феноменальном богатстве покупателя".

traits.locale_text: "Но предупреждаю сразу — они осторожны, и выманить их на сделку сможет лишь слух о поистине феноменальном богатстве покупателя".

languages.text: "But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."
languages.original_text: "Но предупреждаю сразу — они осторожны, и выманить их на сделку сможет лишь слух о поистине феноменальном богатстве покупателя".

traits.locale_text: "But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, they don't make deals with just anybody. They can only be tempted by a rumor about a prospective buyer's truly phenomenal wealth."
"But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, they don't make deals with just anybody. They can only be tempted by a rumor about a prospective buyer's truly phenomenal wealth."
"But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."
"But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."
"But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."

languages.text: « Cela dit, je préfère vous prévenir : ce sont des gens méfiants qui ne font pas affaire avec n'importe qui. Ils n'accordent leur intérêt qu'aux acheteurs les plus phénoménalement riches. »
languages.original_text: "But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."

traits.locale_text: « Cela dit, je préfère vous prévenir : ce sont des gens méfiants qui ne font pas affaire avec n'importe qui. Ils n'accordent leur intérêt qu'aux acheteurs les plus phénoménalement riches. »

languages.text: "Aber lassen Sie mich Sie gleich warnen: Sie sind ein vorsichtiger Haufen, und sie machen nicht mit jedem Geschäfte. Nur ein Käufer mit wirklich phänomenalem Reichtum könnte ihr Interesse wecken."
languages.original_text: "But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."

traits.locale_text: "Aber lassen Sie mich Sie gleich warnen: Sie sind ein vorsichtiger Haufen, und sie machen nicht mit jedem Geschäfte. Nur ein Käufer mit wirklich phänomenalem Reichtum könnte ihr Interesse wecken."

languages.text: "Pero déjame advertirte ahora mismo: son un grupo cauteloso y no hacen tratos con cualquiera. Sólo un comprador con una riqueza realmente fenomenal podría despertar su interés".
languages.original_text: "But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."

traits.locale_text: "Pero déjame advertirte ahora mismo: son un grupo cauteloso y no hacen tratos con cualquiera. Sólo un comprador con una riqueza realmente fenomenal podría despertar su interés".

languages.text: "Ama sizi şimdiden uyarayım — temkinli bir grupturlar ve öyle herkesle anlaşma yapmazlar. Sadece gerçekten olağanüstü servete sahip bir alıcı ilgilerini çekebilir."
languages.original_text: "But let me warn you right now — they are a cautious bunch, and they don't make deals with just anybody. Only a buyer with truly phenomenal wealth could pique their interest."

traits.locale_text: "Ama sizi şimdiden uyarayım — temkinli bir grupturlar ve öyle herkesle anlaşma yapmazlar. Sadece gerçekten olağanüstü servete sahip bir alıcı ilgilerini çekebilir."
